title: Staff Accountant
description: Honeywell is seeking a Staff Accountant to join our Finance team in Raleigh. You'll manage general ledger accounts, prepare financial statements, and ensure accuracy of our accounting records. Work onsite for a global industrial leader managing diverse operations across aerospace, building, and performance materials.
responsibilities: Record transactions and reconcile general ledger accounts monthly
Prepare and review financial statements and supporting schedules
Assist with quarterly and annual close processes
Maintain documentation and ensure compliance with accounting standards

requirements.education: Bachelor's degree in Accounting or Finance
skills: Attention to detail and analytical skills

benefits: Comprehensive health, dental, and vision plans
On-site facilities and career development programs
